docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OFFOMAH, UCHENNA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OFFOMAH, UCHENNA
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF - ZOOM REQUEST DENIED(UNITMELY)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED DUE TO UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY OFFOMAH, UCHENNA AS TO DEFENDANT MELVILLE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-04-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF UCHENNA OFFOMAH IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM REQUEST. DEFENDANT DAVID MELVILLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTED THAT THE CONTINUANCE DATE BE JOINED WITH THE PLAINTIFF'S OTHER CASE AGAINST HIM CSM-21-864658. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $400.00) SERVED JUN-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MELVILLE, DAVID
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-22-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF UCHENNA OFFOMAH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DAVID MELVILLE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. MATTER IS HEARD WITH RELATED CASE CSM-21-864658. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS REACHED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,100.00. THE RELATED CASE, CSM -21-864658 IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY RETAIN THE CASHIER'S CHECK THAT WAS ORIGINALLY SUBMITTED TO DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES OF $200.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE TOTAL AMOUNT AGREED TOO AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. DEFENDANTS MAILING ADDRESS IS UPDATED PURSUANT TO DEFENDANTS REQUEST IN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (INCLUDING RELATED CASE CSM-21-864658 WHICH WAS JOINED WITH CSM-21-864434). NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED** UNTIMELY
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
